titleStmt.title: SII 16.149: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 149. (A.R. No. 514 of 1906.) MUTUKŪRU, PULIVENDALA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the platform in front of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Parābhava, Chaitra śu. 11, Monday, corresponding to 1546 A.D., March 13. The year was current. The week-day, however, was Saturday.

It records the remission of maṅgaḷapannu, dommaripannu, and veṭṭi-vēmulu of Muttukūru, a village belonging to the temple of Tiruveṅgaḷanātha and situated in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, under the orders of Rāmarājayya to Koṇḍōju, son of Kandanavōli Timmōju by Baicharāju Timarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1469 Agunēṭi parābhavasaṁvvatsara caitra su 11 sō śrīmaṁ
nmahārāja rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivadēva ma
hārāyalu vijayanagarapaṭaṇamaṁdunu sukhasaṁgatāvinōdaṁbu
na ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍaipṛthivisāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu rāmarāja
yyavāru Ānaticiri . tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu śrīvirūpakṣa śrīviṭhalēśvarula saṁ
nnidhini kaṁddanavōli timmōjukoḍuku koṁḍōjuku maṁgaḷapannu sarvamānyaṁgānu
manniṁstimi rāmarājayya mudulanu ghaṁḍikōṭa śīmalōnu tiruveṁgaḷanātha
dēvarakucellē muttukūrigrāmaṁ baIcarāju timarājugāru maṁgaḷapanu
domaripaṁnnu veṭṭivēmulu sahā sarvamānyaṁgānu mānitimi Ani [vēIṁ]ci
na śāsanaṁ [.] yiṁduku ganaka yavaru tappinānu gaṁggakarttanu gōbrā
pāpāna bōvuvāru maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī jēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 16.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
